name: Gilded Painting Frame
tip: Stand inside the gold frame of a wall painting and paint warm gold with deep green damask to merge with the artwork.

name: Library Bookshelf Spine
tip: Press flat against the library shelf and sample alternating green and gold to mimic the spine color blocks.

name: Tiled Bathroom Wall
tip: Use the eyedropper on two alternating tile colors and paint a checker pattern on your limbs for a tile-grid look.

name: Kitchen Shelf Gap
tip: Crouch into the gap between kitchen shelves; paint warm brown to disappear into the cabinet shadows.

name: Pillar Top Hide
tip: Climb a hallway stone pillar and freeze at the top; paint cream base with green damask accent.

name: Ballroom Balloon Cluster
tip: Stand inside the ballroom balloon bouquet; paint loud pink with white highlights to merge with the cluster.

name: Red Armrest Chair
tip: Curl into the red velvet armrest of a parlor chair; paint deep crimson with darker shadow side.

name: Cow-Standee Side
tip: Press against a black-and-white cow standee and paint vertical stripes to mimic the hide pattern.

name: Hay Bale Stack
tip: Curl inside a hay bale stack; paint wheat-gold with darker amber streaks.

name: Red Barn Door
tip: Step behind the red barn door arch and paint deep barn red with darker shadow side.

name: Green Crate Stack
tip: Squeeze between the green crate stack; paint vivid grass-green with darker shadow.

name: Pumpkin Patch
tip: Hide inside the pumpkin patch; paint bright orange with green stem accent on your head.

name: Cartoon Cloud Mural
tip: Press against the painted sky cloud mural; paint sky-blue with puffy white blobs to merge in.

name: Overhead Pipe Shadow
tip: Hang under an overhead pipe and paint sooty charcoal to merge with the pipe shadow.

name: Graffiti Wall
tip: Flatten against the chaotic graffiti wall and paint a similar mix of colors and lines; a Seeker's eye will read you as part of the art.

name: Red Oil Drum
tip: Press behind a red oil drum; paint deep red with darker shadow side, avoid going too bright.

name: Locker Room Gap
tip: Crouch into a half-open locker in the side room; paint rust brown to match the locker interior.

name: Flooded Bin Corner
tip: Step into the partially flooded corner with concrete blocks; paint grey with darker puddle shadow.

name: Exit Sign Pose
tip: Press flat against the green exit sign and paint a matching green block with a thin white border.

name: Bicycle Wall
tip: Stand inside the bike-on-wall shape and paint yellow-black stripes to break your human silhouette.

name: Stacked Chair Pile
tip: Crouch into the stacked-chair pile and paint a yellow-grey office-chair hue.

name: Ceiling Light Corner
tip: Float near an overhead light fixture and paint pure white with a warm yellow halo so the bright room washes you out.

name: Office Trash Corner
tip: Squeeze into the trash pile in the back corner and paint a mix of grey and off-white paper tones.

name: Penguin Statue Cluster
tip: Waddle into the penguin statue cluster and paint a black-and-white penguin silhouette with belly highlight.

name: First-Bedroom Duck
tip: Pose to match the rubber duck's shape in the first bedroom and paint yellow with white belly.

name: Bathroom Tub Crouch
tip: Lie flat inside the bathtub and paint white tile with a soft blue water reflection.

name: Floating Balloon Decor
tip: Take a rounded pose near a balloon cluster; paint pink with white highlight to blend as a decor balloon.

name: Bedroom Under-Bed
tip: Crouch under the bed edge and paint warm linen to match the blanket shadow.

name: Ceiling Fan Hue
tip: Hang from the ceiling fan area and paint light grey with dark blade accents so Seekers scan eye-level past you.

name: Truck Bed Hide
tip: Hide inside the truck bed near the wall; paint white with brown wood-tarp accent.

name: Octopus Sign Above
tip: Take a high pose against the giant octopus wall sign; paint pink with a soft white eye highlight.

name: Trash Bag Stack
tip: Lie inside a trash bag pile near the wall; paint near-black with grey plastic highlight.

name: Shopfront Wall Crouch
tip: Crouch inside an open shopfront against the back wall; paint pale blue with white trim.

name: Octopus Statue Floor
tip: Lie down between the two downed octopus statues; paint pink with white suckers pattern.

name: Plywood Stack Corner
tip: Squeeze into the plywood stack in a walled corner; paint warm tan wood with darker grain.
